membership_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

letter.text: เลขที่เอกสาร

book_day.text: วันที่หนังสือ

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,'!letter_1!' as letter , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_day_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as book_day , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no)as mem_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem (sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no)as group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, '0' , 6 ) as address_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 7 ) as mooban , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 8 ) as moo , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 9 ) as road , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 10 ) as soi , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 11 ) as tambol , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 12 ) as district , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 13 ) as province , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 14 ) as postcode , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , '0' , 15 ) as telephone
,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no)as ref_name ,FP_GET_COLL_MEMNO(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as loantest from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resign_code = '1040' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = '064467' group by sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,FP_GET_COLL_MEMNO(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no )
